title: Crunchy Garlic Beef Stir Fry
description: A simple and delicious Chinese-inspired stir fry recipe made with beef, garlic, and crunchy elements.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of tadka oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the beef from the wok and set aside.
In the same wok, add the remaining 1 tbsp of tadka oil.
Add the garlic and ginger and stir-fry until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Add the soy sauce and sesame oil, and stir-fry for another minute.
Return the beef to the wok and stir-fry everything together.
Add the crunch and stir-fry for another minute.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
